---
title: "Georeferencia"
author: "JADM"
format: html
editor: visual
---

##bertelmann_h_2025_PECS

When you click the **Render** button a document will be generated that includes both content and the output of embedded code. You can embed code like this:

```{r}
packages <- c("tidyverse", "readxl", "readr", "data.table", "dplyr", "stringr", "ggplot2", "sf", "fs", "rnaturalearth", "rnaturalearthdata", "rio", "countrycode","maps", "stringi","rnaturalearthdata","devtools", "pack", "cli", "remotes", "countrycode","progress", "tidygeocoder", "dplyr", "readr", "purrr","ggplot")
# Install packages not yet installed [for the first time]
installed_packages <- packages %in% rownames(installed.packages())
if (any(installed_packages == FALSE)) {
install.packages(packages[!installed_packages])
}
library(readr)
```

You can add options to executable code like this

```{r}
#ImportarDatos

dfBR <- read.csv("C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/1.Raw/georef__bertelmann_h_2025_PECS.csv", sep = ",")
View(georeferencing_audit_summary)
View(dfBR)
names(dfBR) # check names of the columns
View(dfBR) # if you want to open and see the file
head(dfBR) # if you want to see more or less the structure of the dataframe (df)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

#FiltrarDatos
dfBR1 <- dfBR %>%
  filter(.ok_for_analysis == FALSE,
         !is.na(decimalLatitude),
         !is.na(decimalLongitude)) %>%
  select(
    occurrenceID,
    decimalLatitude, decimalLongitude,
    locality, country, countryCode,
    changes
  )
```


```{r}
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

#ClasificacionLocalidades 
dfBR <- dfBR %>%
  mutate(
    georef_class = case_when(
      is.na(locality) | stringr::str_squish(locality) == "" ~ "non_georef",
      stringr::str_detect(locality, regex(
        "\\d+\\s*km|carretera|road|highway|reserva|parque nacional|río|quebrada|cerro|vereda",
        ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "detailed",
      TRUE ~ "simple"
    )
  )

#CreacolumnasControl
if (!"ok.2" %in% names(dfBR)) {
  if (".ok_for_analysis" %in% names(dfBR)) {
    dfBR$ok.2 <- dfBR$.ok_for_analysis
  } else {
    dfBR$ok.2 <- FALSE
  }
}
if (!"discardReason" %in% names(dfBR)) dfBR$discardReason <- NA_character_
```


```{r}
#Locality
code <- dfBR$occurrenceID[1:21]
idx <- which(dfBR$occurrenceID %in% code)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBR$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112390"
  dfBR$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBR$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBR$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#Segundosubset

#Locality
code1 <- dfBR$occurrenceID[22:50]
idx <- which(dfBR$occurrenceID %in% code1)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBR$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112320"
  dfBR$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBR$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBR$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#Tercersubset

code2 <- dfBR$occurrenceID[51:74]
idx <- which(dfBR$occurrenceID %in% code2)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBR$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112384"
  dfBR$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBR$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBR$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#Cuartosubset

code3 <- dfBR$occurrenceID[75:87]
idx <- which(dfBR$occurrenceID %in% code3)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBR$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112423"
  dfBR$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBR$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBR$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#QuintoSubset

code4 <- dfBR$occurrenceID[88:128]
idx <- which(dfBR$occurrenceID %in% code4)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBR$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112426"
  dfBR$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBR$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBR$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}
```


```{r}
#ExportarDatos

write.table(x = dfBR, 
            file = "C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/2.Processed/georef__bertelmann_h_2025_PECS.csv", 
            sep = ",",       
            dec = ".",       
            na = "NA", 
            row.names = FALSE)
```


##bertelmann_h_2025_PERE

```{r}
dfBRh <- read.csv("C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/1.Raw/georef__bertelmann_h_2025_PERE.csv",sep = ",")
View(dfBRh)
names(dfBRh) # check names of the columns
View(dfBRh) # if you want to open and see the file
head(dfBRh) # if you want to see more or less the structure of the dataframe (df)
```

```{r}
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

dfBRh <- dfBRh %>%
  mutate(
    georef_class = case_when(
      is.na(locality) | stringr::str_squish(locality) == "" ~ "non_georef",
      stringr::str_detect(locality, regex(
        "\\d+\\s*km|carretera|road|highway|reserva|parque nacional|río|quebrada|cerro|vereda",
        ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "detailed",
      TRUE ~ "simple"
    )
  )

if (!"ok.2" %in% names(dfBRh)) {
  if (".ok_for_analysis" %in% names(dfBRh)) {
    dfBRh$ok.2 <- dfBRh$.ok_for_analysis
  } else {
    dfBRh$ok.2 <- FALSE
  }
}
if (!"discardReason" %in% names(dfBRh)) dfBRh$discardReason <- NA_character_

names(dfBRh)
head(dfBRh)
View(dfBRh)

```


```{r}
ids_a_modificar <- dfBRh$occurrenceID
idx <- which(dfBRh$occurrenceID %in% ids_a_modificar)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRh$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRh$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
}
```

```{r}
dfBRh$ok.2 <- FALSE
VCode <- dfBRh$occurrenceID[1:21]
idx <- which(dfBRh$occurrenceID %in% VCode)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRh$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112670"
  dfBRh$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRh$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRh$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE 
}

#Segundosubset

#Locality
VCode1 <- dfBRh$occurrenceID[22:27]
idx <- which(dfBRh$occurrenceID %in% VCode1)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRh$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112364"
  dfBRh$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRh$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRh$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE 
}

#Tercersubset

VCode2 <- dfBRh$occurrenceID[28:31]
idx <- which(dfBRh$occurrenceID %in% VCode2)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRh$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112356"
  dfBRh$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRh$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRh$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE 
}

#Cuartosubset

VCode3 <- dfBRh$occurrenceID[32:38]
idx <- which(dfBRh$occurrenceID %in% VCode3)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRh$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112372"
  dfBRh$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRh$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRh$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE 
}
```

```{r}
write.table(x = dfBRh, 
            file = "C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/2.Processed/georef__bertelmann_h_2025_PERE.csv", 
            sep = ",",       
            dec = ".",       
            na = "NA", 
            row.names = FALSE)
```

##bertelmann_h_2025_PETE

```{r}
dfBRhi <- read.csv("C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/1.Raw/georef__bertelmann_h_2025_PETE.csv",sep = ",")
View(dfBRhi)
names(dfBRhi) # check names of the columns
View(dfBRhi) # if you want to open and see the file
head(dfBRhi) # if you want to see more or less the structure of the dataframe (df)
```

```{r}
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

dfBRhi <- dfBRhi %>%
  mutate(
    georef_class = case_when(
      is.na(locality) | stringr::str_squish(locality) == "" ~ "non_georef",
      stringr::str_detect(locality, regex(
        "\\d+\\s*km|carretera|road|highway|reserva|parque nacional|río|quebrada|cerro|vereda",
        ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "detailed",
      TRUE ~ "simple"
    )
  )

if (!"ok.2" %in% names(dfBRhi)) {
  if (".ok_for_analysis" %in% names(dfBRhi)) {
    dfBRhi$ok.2 <- dfBRhi$.ok_for_analysis
  } else {
    dfBRhi $ok.2 <- FALSE
  }
}
if (!"discardReason" %in% names(dfBRhi)) dfBRhi$discardReason <- NA_character_

names(dfBRhi)
head(dfBRhi)
View(dfBRhi)
if (!"ok.2" %in% names(dfBRhi)) {
  dfBRhi$ok.2 <- FALSE
}

```

```{r}
ids_a_modificar <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% ids_a_modificar)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
}
```

```{r}
#Locality
Pcode <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[1:5]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112358"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#SegundoSubset

Pcode1 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[6:10]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode1)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112374"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#TercerSubset

Pcode2 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[11:15]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode2)

if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- 112379
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#CuartoSubset

Pcode3 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[16:20]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode3)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112275"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#QuintoSubset

Pcode4 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[21:25]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode4)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112329"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#SextoSubset

Pcode5 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[26:30]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode5)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112334"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#SeptoSubset

Pcode6 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[31:35]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode6)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112345"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#OctavoSubset

Pcode7 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[36:40]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode7)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112369"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#NovenoSubset

Pcode8 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[41:45]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode8)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112333"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#DecimoSubset

Pcode9 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[46:50]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode9)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112328"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#UndecimoSubset

Pcode10 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[51:55]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode10)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112354"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#DuodeimoSubset

Pcode11 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[56:60]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode11)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112346"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#DecimoTercerSubset

Pcode12 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[61:65]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode12)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112343"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#DecimoCuartoSubset

Pcode13 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[66:70]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode13)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112340"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE }

#DecimoQuintoSubset

Pcode14 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[71:75]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode14)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112356"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#DecimoSextoSubset

Pcode15 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[76:80]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode15)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112361"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#DecimoSeptoSubset

Pcode16 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[81:85]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode16)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112351"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#DecimoOctavoSubset

Pcode17 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[86:90]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode17)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112347"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

#DecimoNovenoSubset

Pcode18 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[91:95]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode18)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112324"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE }
#SubsetVeinte

Pcode14 <- dfBRhi$occurrenceID[96:100]
idx <- which(dfBRhi$occurrenceID %in% Pcode14)
if (length(idx) > 0) {
  dfBRhi$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- "112322"
  dfBRhi$locality[idx] <- "Manu National Park"
  dfBRhi$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, campo de texto de localidad estaba mal"
  dfBRhi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
}

```

```{r}
write.table(x = dfBRhi, 
            file = "C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/2.Processed/georef__bertelmann_h_2025_PETE.csv", 
            sep = ",",       
            dec = ".",       
            na = "NA", 
            row.names = FALSE)
```

##carranza_av_2004

```{r}
dfJ <- read.csv("C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/1.Raw/georef__carranza_av_2004.csv",sep = ",")
View(dfJ)
names(dfJ) # check names of the columns
View(dfJ) # if you want to open and see the file
head(dfJ) # if you want to see more or less the structure of the dataframe (df)

```

```{r}
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

dfJ <- dfJ %>%
  mutate(
    georef_class = case_when(
      is.na(locality) | stringr::str_squish(locality) == "" ~ "non_georef",
      stringr::str_detect(locality, regex(
        "\\d+\\s*km|carretera|road|highway|reserva|parque nacional|río|quebrada|cerro|vereda",
        ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "detailed",
      TRUE ~ "simple"
    )
  )

if (!"ok.2" %in% names(dfJ)) {
  if (".ok_for_analysis" %in% names(dfJ)) {
    dfJ$ok.2 <- dfJ$.ok_for_analysis
  } else {
    dfJ $ok.2 <- FALSE
  }
}
if (!"discardReason" %in% names(dfJ)) dfJ$discardReason <- NA_character_

names(dfJ)
head(dfJ)
View(dfJ)
if (!"ok.2" %in% names(dfJ)) {
  dfJ$ok.2 <- FALSE
}

```

```{r}
#StateProvince
idx <- 1:12

dfJ$stateProvince[idx] <- "Jujuy"

dfJ$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE

#AsignacionLocality
idx <- 1:12

locality_en <- c(
  "Potrero de Yala Provincial Park, Loza Hill",
  "El Rodeo Lagoon",
  "Yala, Loza Hill",
  "Loza Hill, ascent after the landslide (Yala)",
  "Loza Hill",
  "Yala, El Rodeo Lagoon",
  "Potrero de Yala Provincial Park, Laguna Hill",
  "Yala, Laguna Hill",
  "Yala, San Antonio Hill",
  "Yala, Los Noques Lagoon",
  "Yala, Las Varas Ravine",
  "Las Varas Ravine"
)

dfJ$locality[idx] <- locality_en
```

```{r}
coord <- c(
  3205,  # Fila 1
  1728,  # Fila 2
  2056,  # Fila 3
  2158,  # Fila 4
  3206,  # Fila 5
  1873,  # Fila 6
  1653,  # Fila 7
  1653,  # Fila 8
  692,   # Fila 9
  517,   # Fila 10
  2974,  # Fila 11
  3054   # Fila 12
)

dfJ$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[1:12] <- coord

dfJ$discardReason[1:12] <- "corregido, se agregó la provincia (stateProvince) Jujuy, se tradujo locality al inglés y se calculó coordinateUncertaintyInMeters"
dfJ$ok.2[1:12] <- TRUE
```

```{r}
write.table(x = dfJ, 
            file = "C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/2.Processed/georef__carranza_av_2004.csv", 
            sep = ",",       
            dec = ".",       
            na = "NA", 
            row.names = FALSE)
```

##carranza_av_2023

```{r}
dfJk <- read.csv("C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/1.Raw/georef__carranza_av_2023.csv",sep = ",")
View(dfJk)
names(dfJk) # check names of the columns
View(dfJk) # if you want to open and see the file
head(dfJk) # if you want to see more or less the structure of the dataframe (df)

```

```{r}
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

str(dfJk)

if (!"ok.2" %in% names(dfJk)) {
  if (".ok_for_analysis" %in% names(dfJk)) {
    dfJk$ok.2 <- dfJk$.ok_for_analysis
  } else {
    dfJk$ok.2 <- FALSE
  }
}

if (!"discardReason" %in% names(dfJk)) {
  dfJk$discardReason <- NA_character_
}

names(dfJk)
head(dfJk)
View(dfJk)
```

```{r}
idx <- 1:13

dfJk$stateProvince[idx] <- "Jujuy"

dfJk$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE

locality_en <- c(
  "Calilegua National Park. Mesada de las Colmenas Sector. Trail to the waterfall",
  "Calilegua National Park. Mesada de las Colmenas Sector",
  "Calilegua National Park. Trail from Los Toldos to Totorillas Stream headwaters",
  "Calilegua National Park, southern sector, southern Aguas Negras stream",
  "Calilegua National Park. Aguas Negras Sector",
  "Calilegua National Park, Caimancito",
  "Calilegua National Park, provincial route 83",
  "Calilegua National Park, provincial route 83",
  "Calilegua National Park, national route 83 sector, Aguas Negras stream",
  "Calilegua National Park, provincial route 83",
  "Calilegua National Park. Eastern Sector. Caimancito Subsector",
  "Calilegua National Park. Eastern Sector. Caimancito",
  "Calilegua National Park. Eastern Sector. Caimancito"
)

dfJk$locality[idx] <- locality_en
```

```{r}
idx <- 1:13

coord_uncertainty <- c(
  7106, 7125, 11020, 17786, 631, 30765, 5892,
  5892, 596, 8895, 28633, 29247, 29230
)

dfJk$coordinateUncertaintyInMeters[idx] <- coord_uncertainty

dfJk$discardReason[idx] <- "corregido, se agregó la provincia (stateProvince) Jujuy, se tradujo locality al inglés y se calculó coordinateUncertaintyInMeters"
```

```{r}
write.table(x = dfJ, 
            file = "C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/2.Processed/georef__carranza_av_2023.csv", 
            sep = ",",       
            dec = ".",       
            na = "NA", 
            row.names = FALSE)
```

##BA2025

```{r}
dfEi <- read.csv("C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/1.Raw/georef__BA2025.csv",sep = ",")
View(dfEi)
names(dfEi) # check names of the columns
View(dfEi) # if you want to open and see the file
head(dfEi) # if you want to see more or less the structure of the dataframe (df)
```

```{r}
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)

str(dfEi)

if (!"ok.2" %in% names(dfEi)) {
  if (".ok_for_analysis" %in% names(dfEi)) {
    dfEi$ok.2 <- dfEi$.ok_for_analysis
  } else {
    dfEi$ok.2 <- FALSE
  }
}

if (!"discardReason" %in% names(dfEi)) {
  dfEi$discardReason <- NA_character_
}

names(dfEi)
head(dfEi)
View(dfEi)
```

```{r}
idx <- which(dfEi$occurrenceID %in% c("BA2025_140", "BA2025_159"))

dfEi$country[idx]     <- "Chile"
dfEi$countryCode[idx] <- "CL"

dfEi$discardReason[idx] <- paste0(
  coalesce(dfEi$discardReason[idx], ""),
  " | country/countryCode corregido de Switzerland/CH a Chile/CL (Taltal y Copiapó son ciudades chilenas)"
)

dfEi$ok.2[idx] <- TRUE
```

```{r}
#Argentina
dfEi <- dfEi %>%
  mutate(
    stateProvince = case_when(
      !is.na(stateProvince) & str_squish(stateProvince) != "" ~ stateProvince,
      country != "Argentina" ~ stateProvince,

      str_detect(locality, regex("^Misiones|Cataratas del Iguaz|^San Ignacio$|Loreto \\(ruinas\\)|^Loreto$|Río Uruguaí",
                                  ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Misiones",

      str_detect(locality, regex("^Buenos Aires|Delta del Río Paraná|Otamendi|^Bernal$|Carmen de Patagones|desembocadura del Río Salado|Estación Florida",
                                  ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Buenos Aires",

      str_detect(locality, regex("San Salvador de Jujuy|Humahuaca|^Ledesma$|Valle Grande|^Cobos$|Cerro de Calilegua|Río Zapala",
                                  ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Jujuy",

      str_detect(locality, regex("^Alemania$|Coronel Juan Solá|^Orán,|^Cafayate$|Quebrada de San Lorenzo|Sierra de la Candelaria|El Antigal",
                                  ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Salta",

      str_detect(locality, regex("^Vipos$|^Tapia$|Yerba Buena|Siambón|Villa Nougués|El Timbó|Cadillal|Quebrada de Lules|San Miguel de Tucumán|Amaicha del Valle|Tapia a Raco|Cadillal a Tapia|Valle de Tafí|La Hoyada|Colalao del Valle|Tucumán, bosques",
                                  ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Tucumán",

      str_detect(locality, regex("Unquillo|Dique La Ciénaga|La Cumbre|Sierra Chica|Sierra Achala|^San Javier$",
                                  ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Córdoba",

      str_detect(locality, regex("Curuzú Cuatiá", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Corrientes",

      str_detect(locality, regex("Valle de Santa María", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Catamarca",

      TRUE ~ stateProvince
    ),
    discardReason = case_when(
      country == "Argentina" & is.na(stateProvince) ~ "stateProvince ambiguo, requiere verificación manual (etiqueta original)",
      !is.na(stateProvince) & country == "Argentina" ~ paste0(coalesce(discardReason, ""), " | stateProvince inferido por locality"),
      TRUE ~ discardReason
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#Bolivia
dfEi <- dfEi %>%
  mutate(
    stateProvince = case_when(
      !is.na(stateProvince) & str_squish(stateProvince) != "" ~ stateProvince,
      country != "Bolivia" ~ stateProvince,

      str_detect(locality, regex("Buenavista|Pampa Grande|Mairana|Santa Cruz de la Sierra",
                                  ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Santa Cruz",

      TRUE ~ stateProvince
    ),
    discardReason = case_when(
      country == "Bolivia" & str_detect(locality, regex("Buenavista|Pampa Grande|Mairana|Santa Cruz de la Sierra", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~
        paste0(coalesce(discardReason, ""), " | stateProvince inferido por locality (Santa Cruz)"),
      country == "Bolivia" & (is.na(stateProvince) | str_squish(stateProvince) == "") ~
        paste0(coalesce(discardReason, ""), " | stateProvince ambiguo, requiere verificación manual"),
      TRUE ~ discardReason
    ),
    ok.2 = case_when(
      country == "Bolivia" & str_detect(locality, regex("Buenavista|Pampa Grande|Mairana|Santa Cruz de la Sierra", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ ok.2
    )
  )
```

```{r}
#Paraguay

stateProvince_manual <- c(
  "BA2025_001" = "Alto Parana",
  "BA2025_026" = "Concepcion",
  "BA2025_027" = "Concepcion",
  "BA2025_075" = "Amambay",
  "BA2025_076" = "Paraguari",
  "BA2025_077" = "Paraguari",
  "BA2025_078" = "Caaguazu",
  "BA2025_079" = "Caaguazu",
  "BA2025_085" = "Paraguari",
  "BA2025_089" = "Paraguari",
  "BA2025_095" = "Alto Parana",
  "BA2025_096" = "Alto Parana",
  "BA2025_113" = "Presidente Hayes",
  "BA2025_130" = "Presidente Hayes",
  "BA2025_141" = "Presidente Hayes",
  "BA2025_179" = "Caazapa",
  "BA2025_184" = "Amambay",
  "BA2025_222" = "San Pedro",
  "BA2025_223" = "Alto Paraguay",
  "BA2025_230" = "Cordillera",
  "BA2025_233" = "Alto Paraguay",
  "BA2025_247" = "Alto Paraguay",
  "BA2025_259" = "Canindeyu",
  "BA2025_260" = "Canindeyu",
  "BA2025_262" = "Cordillera"
)

for (id in names(stateProvince_manual)) {
  row_idx <- which(dfEi$occurrenceID == id)
  if (length(row_idx) == 0) next

  dfEi$stateProvince[row_idx] <- stateProvince_manual[id]

  already_logged <- str_detect(coalesce(dfEi$discardReason[row_idx], ""), "stateProvince corregido manualmente")
  if (!already_logged) {
    dfEi$discardReason[row_idx] <- paste0(
      coalesce(dfEi$discardReason[row_idx], ""),
      " | stateProvince corregido manualmente según etiqueta original"
    )
  }
  dfEi$ok.2[row_idx] <- TRUE
} 

#Locality

locality_en <- c(
  "BA2025_001" = "Puerto Bertoni",
  "BA2025_026" = "San Lazaro Colony",
  "BA2025_027" = "San Lazaro Colony",
  "BA2025_075" = "Amambay Mountains, Torin Hill",
  "BA2025_076" = "Acahay Hill",
  "BA2025_077" = "Acahay Hill",
  "BA2025_078" = "Primera Estate",
  "BA2025_079" = "Primera Estate",
  "BA2025_085" = "Acahay Hill",
  "BA2025_089" = "Acahay Hill",
  "BA2025_095" = "Itakyry",
  "BA2025_096" = "Itakyry",
  "BA2025_113" = "Paraguayan Chaco, Loma Pora Ranch",
  "BA2025_130" = "Paraguayan Chaco, Loma Pora Ranch",
  "BA2025_141" = "Pink flowers and bracts",
  "BA2025_179" = "Fulgencio Yegros, in the woodlands",
  "BA2025_184" = "Mountain woodlands",
  "BA2025_222" = "Paraguayan Chaco, Alegria Ranch",
  "BA2025_223" = "Puerto Fonciere, on the limestone bluff of the Paraguay River",
  "BA2025_230" = "San Bernardino, Ypacarai Lagoon",
  "BA2025_233" = "Paraguayan Chaco, Puerto Casado woodlands",
  "BA2025_247" = "Puerto Antequera, bluff of the Paraguay River",
  "BA2025_259" = "Mbaracayú Forest Nature Reserve",
  "BA2025_260" = "Mbaracayú Forest Nature Reserve",
  "BA2025_262" = "Ybytyruzú Mountains"
)

for (id in names(locality_en)) {
  row_idx <- which(dfEi$occurrenceID == id)
  if (length(row_idx) == 0) next
  dfEi$locality[row_idx] <- locality_en[id]
}
```

```{r}
dfEi <- dfEi %>%
  mutate(
    stateProvince = case_when(
      !is.na(stateProvince) & str_squish(stateProvince) != "" ~ stateProvince,

      # Brasil
      country == "Brazil" & str_detect(locality, regex("Cubatão", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "São Paulo",
      country == "Brazil" & str_detect(locality, regex("Penha de França|Serra do Ambrosio|Barro Preto", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Minas Gerais",
      country == "Brazil" & str_detect(locality, regex("Itatiaia", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Rio de Janeiro",

      # Cuba
      country == "Cuba" & str_detect(locality, regex("Soledad", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Cienfuegos",
      country == "Cuba" & str_detect(locality, regex("Trinidad Hills", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Sancti Spíritus",

      # Estados Unidos
      country == "United States" & str_detect(locality, regex("Jacksonville", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Florida",

      # México
      country == "Mexico" & str_detect(locality, regex("Xicotepec", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Puebla",

      # Colombia
      country == "Colombia" & str_detect(locality, regex("Turbaco", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Bolívar",

      # Uruguay
      country == "Uruguay" & str_detect(locality, regex("Jardín Botánico", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Montevideo",
      country == "Uruguay" & str_detect(locality, regex("Cerro Arequita", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "Lavalleja",

      TRUE ~ stateProvince
    ),
    discardReason = case_when(
      country %in% c("Brazil","Cuba","United States","Mexico","Colombia","Uruguay") &
        !is.na(stateProvince) & str_squish(stateProvince) != "" ~
        paste0(coalesce(discardReason, ""), " | stateProvince inferido por locality"),
      country %in% c("Brazil","Cuba","United States","Mexico","Colombia","Uruguay") &
        (is.na(stateProvince) | str_squish(stateProvince) == "") ~
        paste0(coalesce(discardReason, ""), " | stateProvince ambiguo, requiere verificación manual"),
      TRUE ~ discardReason
    ),
    ok.2 = case_when(
      country %in% c("Brazil","Cuba","United States","Mexico","Colombia","Uruguay") &
        !is.na(stateProvince) & str_squish(stateProvince) != "" ~ TRUE,
      TRUE ~ ok.2
    )
  ) 
```

```{r}
write.table(x = dfEi, 
            file = "C:/Users/User/Documents/EpiG/EpIG_volunteership/data/Georreferencing/2.Processed/georef__BA2025.csv", 
            sep = ",",       
            dec = ".",       
            na = "NA", 
            row.names = FALSE)
```
